title: MedlinePlus: Genetic Conditions
text:
ry cystic kidney disease type 1

Autosomal dominant optic atrophy and cataract

Autosomal dominant partial epilepsy with auditory features, see Autosomal dominant epilepsy with auditory features

Autosomal dominant sleep-related hypermotor (hyperkinetic) epilepsy, see Autosomal dominant sleep-related hypermotor epil
